metadata.description: Primary references for risk-based testing strategy, shift-left gates, flake control, CI economics, chaos engineering, observability-driven testing, synthetic data, and contract testing. AI sources are optional.

sre_and_reliability.name: Google SRE Book - Service Level Objectives
sre_and_reliability.description: SLO/error budget framing for quality gates and release decisions.

sre_and_reliability.name: Google SRE Book - Effective Troubleshooting
sre_and_reliability.description: Evidence-based troubleshooting workflow that maps well to flaky-test and incident triage.

contracts_and_schemas.name: OpenAPI Specification (Latest)
contracts_and_schemas.description: Canonical contract format for REST APIs; use for shift-left contract validation and test oracles.

contracts_and_schemas.name: AsyncAPI Specification (v3)
contracts_and_schemas.description: Contract format for event-driven APIs; use for schema and integration tests.

contracts_and_schemas.name: JSON Schema
contracts_and_schemas.description: Schema standard for structured data and contract testing.

contracts_and_schemas.name: Pact - Contract Testing Docs
contracts_and_schemas.description: Consumer-driven contract testing patterns and tooling.

contracts_and_schemas.name: Specmatic - Contract-Driven Development
contracts_and_schemas.description: Contract-driven development using OpenAPI as executable contracts; alternative to Pact for API-first teams.

contracts_and_schemas.name: Karate - API Testing DSL
contracts_and_schemas.description: Unified DSL for API testing, contract testing, and performance testing in one framework.

e2e_and_ui_testing.name: Playwright - Best Practices
e2e_and_ui_testing.description: High-signal E2E practices: locators, web-first assertions, debugging tooling, sharding.

e2e_and_ui_testing.name: Playwright - Locators
e2e_and_ui_testing.description: Locator strategy (roles/labels/test IDs) and stability guidance.

e2e_and_ui_testing.name: Cypress Documentation
e2e_and_ui_testing.description: Alternative E2E framework with excellent DX; strong for frontend-focused teams.

unit_testing.name: Vitest Documentation
unit_testing.description: Fast Vite-native unit test runner; increasingly popular for modern JS/TS projects.

integration_testing.name: Testcontainers
integration_testing.description: Hermetic integration testing with real dependencies (DB, queues) running in containers.

integration_testing.name: testcontainers-node
integration_testing.description: Testcontainers for Node.js/TypeScript; common choice for API + DB integration tests.

performance_and_capacity.name: Web Vitals
performance_and_capacity.description: Core Web Vitals guidance for performance budgets and monitoring.

chaos_engineering.name: Principles of Chaos Engineering
chaos_engineering.description: Foundational principles for chaos engineering practice.

chaos_engineering.name: Gremlin - Chaos Engineering
chaos_engineering.description: Enterprise chaos engineering platform with attack library and gameday automation.

chaos_engineering.name: AWS Fault Injection Simulator
chaos_engineering.description: AWS-native chaos engineering service for controlled experiments.

observability_and_tracing.name: OpenTelemetry Documentation
observability_and_tracing.description: Vendor-neutral observability framework for traces, metrics, and logs.

observability_and_tracing.name: Tracetest
observability_and_tracing.description: Trace-based testing tool for asserting on OpenTelemetry traces.

observability_and_tracing.name: Jaeger Tracing
observability_and_tracing.description: Open-source distributed tracing platform for monitoring microservices.

synthetic_data.name: K2view Test Data Management
synthetic_data.description: Enterprise test data management with subsetting, masking, and synthetic generation.

synthetic_data.name: Synthesized - Synthetic Data Platform
synthetic_data.description: AI-powered synthetic data generation for privacy-compliant testing.

accessibility.name: W3C - WCAG Overview
accessibility.description: Accessibility baseline; align automated checks and manual audits with WCAG targets.

accessibility.name: axe-core
accessibility.description: Automation engine for accessibility rules; integrate into component/UI tests.

security.name: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard (ASVS)
security.description: Security verification requirements for planning test coverage and gates.

optional_ai_automation.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
optional_ai_automation.description: Risk categories and mitigations for AI-assisted workflows; treat as optional extension.

optional_ai_automation.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
optional_ai_automation.description: AI governance baseline; useful when adopting AI-assisted testing and triage.

optional_ai_automation.name: Meticulous - AI E2E Testing
optional_ai_automation.description: AI-powered automated E2E test recording and maintenance; emerging 2026 tool.
